Module pgl.app
Package pgl.app.io

Class CsvIncidentImporter

java.lang.Object
pgl.app.io.CsvIncidentImporter
public class CsvIncidentImporter extends Object
Utility class responsible for importing victim incident data from a CSV file.

  • Constructor Details

    • CsvIncidentImporter

      public CsvIncidentImporter()

  • Method Details

    • importFromCsv

      public static List<VictimIncident> importFromCsv(Path filePath, int startCount) throws IOException
      Parses a CSV file containing incident (victim) data and converts it into a list of VictimIncident.

      The expected format for each row (with or without a header) is: X; Y; EmergencyType; PreferredHospitalId or X, Y, EmergencyType, PreferredHospitalId.

      Parsing rules:

      • Empty lines are ignored.
      • The separator can be a comma (,) or a semicolon (;).
      • The first line is automatically skipped if it is identified as a header.
      • If the emergency type is missing or invalid, it defaults to MedicalSpecialty.GENERAL.
      • If the preferred hospital ID is missing, invalid (e.g. "N/A"), or <0, it defaults to null.
      • Rows with invalid coordinates are skipped and an error is logged.
      Parameters:
      filePath - the Path to the CSV file to be read
      startCount - the starting number used to generate unique incident IDs
      Returns:
      a List of parsed VictimIncident objects
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while reading the file
